name: suno-lyric-video
description: Create a polished Remotion lyric video and mood-matched album cover from a Suno MP3 and SRT file.

interface.shortDescription: Turn a Suno MP3 and SRT into a polished lyric video.
interface.longDescription: Analyzes lyrics, generates a mood-matched album cover, builds a synchronized Remotion lyric video, validates representative frames, and starts a local preview.
defaultPrompt: Create a lyric video from the MP3 and SRT in this project.
Generate a matching album cover and render my lyric video.
